title: ca-certificates bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2025.2.80_v9.0.305-102]
- Remove /etc/pki/tls/certs/ca-certificates.crt symlink which was included by mistake
full_text:
